sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Authority headline with dual CTA and trust chips. Sets the offer and qualification immediately above the fold.

sections.name: Stats Bar
sections.description: Four scannable metrics: meetings booked, clients served, industries, and Clutch rating. Anchors credibility below the hero.

sections.name: Problem / Agitate
sections.description: Named founder pain cards. Identifies the sole-salesperson trap and failed-hire cost before presenting the solution.

sections.name: Solution
sections.description: Split-screen positioning with three service cards: assigned SDR reps, playbook build, and pipeline management.

sections.name: How It Works
sections.description: Three-step numbered process: Audit, Build, Scale. Removes the 'black box' fear before commitment.

sections.name: Case Studies
sections.description: Card grid with outcome stats, industry tags, and client context. Every card leads with a specific number.

sections.name: Objection Handling
sections.description: Three named objection cards addressing market understanding, risk of no results, and management overhead.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.description: Video embed slot plus two pull-quotes from named founder clients. Video triggers faster trust than text alone.

sections.name: Risk Reversal
sections.description: Accent-stripe guarantee section. States what happens if month two produces no meetings. Unique to this template.

sections.name: Pricing Anchor
sections.description: Anchor price with inclusion list. Sets expectations before the form. Not a full pricing page.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.description: Six operational questions covering onboarding time, industries, reporting, and cancellation terms.

sections.name: Lead Form
sections.description: Five-field strategy call form. First name, email, company, revenue range, biggest challenge. Inline confirmation.

sections.name: Services Hero
sections.description: Page-specific dark hero with H1 and single CTA.

sections.name: Service Detail
sections.description: Expanded three-column service cards with full copy per offering.

sections.name: How It Works
sections.description: Reused process section providing the execution story.

sections.name: Case Studies
sections.description: Evidence that the services produce measurable outcomes.

sections.name: Lead Form
sections.description: Primary conversion form anchored at base of page.

sections.name: Case Studies Hero
sections.description: Results-led hero with aggregate pipeline and meeting totals from all engagements.

sections.name: Stats Bar
sections.description: Aggregate metrics across all client engagements.

sections.name: Full Case Study Grid
sections.description: All available case studies with full six-field spec per card.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.description: Video and pull-quotes from founder clients.

sections.name: Lead Form
sections.description: Conversion form for visitors who arrived via the results page.

sections.name: About Hero
sections.description: Dark hero introducing the team and their background.

sections.name: Founder
sections.description: Founder photo, narrative, vision, and mission. Builds personal trust.

sections.name: Team
sections.description: Individual member cards with specific sales credentials.

sections.name: Values
sections.description: Three operating principles: outcomes first, radical transparency, buyers first.

sections.name: Lead Form
sections.description: Primary conversion form at base of about page.

sections.name: Contact Hero
sections.description: Call-focused hero with phone and email contact details visible above the fold.

sections.name: Lead Form
sections.description: Primary five-field strategy call form.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.description: Pre-call FAQ addressing final objections.

sections.name: {service_name} Hero
sections.description: Dark hero focused on the specific service with outcome-led H1.

sections.name: Service Detail
sections.description: Full description of the {service_name} offering, what is included, and how it works.

sections.name: Relevant Case Studies
sections.description: Case studies from clients who bought this specific service.

sections.name: Lead Form
sections.description: Conversion form specific to {service_name} inquiry.

sections.name: Outsourced Sales Hero
sections.description: Full-service outsourced sales positioning page.

sections.name: Service Detail
sections.description: What outsourced sales means, what you get, what you don't manage.

sections.name: Case Studies
sections.description: Results from outsourced sales engagements specifically.

sections.name: Lead Form
sections.description: Primary conversion action.

sections.name: Fractional Sales Hero
sections.description: Fractional VP of Sales positioning for companies not ready for a full-time hire.

sections.name: Service Detail
sections.description: What a fractional sales leader does vs. a full-time hire.

sections.name: Lead Form
sections.description: Fractional engagement inquiry form.

sections.name: SDR Services Hero
sections.description: SDR placement and management page.

sections.name: How SDR Engagement Works
sections.description: ICP to outreach to meeting in three steps.

sections.name: SDR Case Studies
sections.description: Meeting volume and pipeline results from SDR-led campaigns.

sections.name: Lead Form
sections.description: SDR inquiry form.
